name: rpg_api
description: Sistema de mural de missões estilo RPG demonstrando arquitetura de microserviços com FastAPI, API Gateway e HATEOAS.

scripts.start: concurrently -n "SHOP,INVENTORY,HERO,QUEST,GATEWAY,BOSS,FRONT,REWARD,LOG" -c "magenta,red,green,blue,cyan,yellow,white,brightBlue,redBright" "cd backend/shop_service && dotnet run" "cd backend/inventory_service && python3 server.py" "cd backend/hero_service && uvicorn main:app --port 8001 --reload" "cd backend/quest_service && uvicorn main:app --port 8002 --reload" "cd backend/gateway && uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --reload" "cd backend/boss_service && go run ." "cd frontend && npm run dev" "npm run sub:reward" "npm run sub:log"
